fields.name: description
fields.description: This is a description of the dashboard configuration, providing context and details about the dashboard.

models.description: This is used to maintain dashboard variables

fields.name: selectionDynamicSQL
fields.description: SQL query to fetch the data for this variable when it is rendered at runtime. This is only applicable when selectionDynamicSourceType is set to SQL.

fields.name: selectionDynamicProviderName
fields.description: This is only applicable when selectionDynamicSourceType is set to provider. It allows the user to select any pre-existing Dashboard SelectionDynamicProvider implementation used to fetch a dynamic dropdown of values to choose from when this variable is presented to the user.

fields.name: isMultiSelect
fields.description: This is relevant only for variables of type "selectionStatic" or "selectionDynamic". When set to true, it allows the user to select multiple values from the dropdown.

fields.name: dashboard
fields.description: Related Dashboard Model

fields.name: defaultValue
fields.description: This is the default value for this variable when it is rendered at runtime. It can be a static value for this variable when it is rendered at runtime.

fields.name: defaultOperator
fields.description: This is the default operator for this variable when it is rendered at runtime. It can be a static value for this variable when it is rendered at runtime.

models.description: This is used to maintain dashboard questions for dashboards

fields.name: labelSql
fields.description: This is the SQL query to fetch the label values for the question

fields.name: kpiSql
fields.description: This is the SQL query to fetch the KPI value for the question

fields.name: providerName
fields.description: This is only applicable when sourceType is set to provider. It allows the user to select any pre-existing Dashboard Question Data provider implementation used to fetch a dynamic dropdown of values to choose from when this question is presented to the user.

fields.name: chartOptions
fields.description: This is a JSON object representing each labels display and color options for the bar chart

fields.name: dashboard
fields.description: Related Dashboard Model

fields.name: questionSqlDatasetConfigs
fields.displayName: Related Dashboard Question SQL Dataset Config
fields.description: Related Question SQL Dataset Config Model

models.description: This is used to maintain Dashboard Question SQL dataset configurations

fields.name: datasetDisplayName
fields.description: This is the display name for the dataset configuration, which can be used in UI components to represent the dataset in a user-friendly manner.

fields.name: description
fields.description: This is a description of the dataset configuration, providing context and details about its purpose.

fields.name: options
fields.description: This allows you to set the dataset options e.g border-color, background-color, etc. This is a JSON object that can be used to customize the dataset appearance or behavior in the UI.

fields.name: question
fields.description: Related Question Model

attrs.label: Force Password Change On First Login

emailTemplates.name: on-force-password-change
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome to {{solidAppName}}!
emailTemplates.description: When using password based signUp, if the user does not specify the password of the new account being created the system automatically triggers a force password change email.

emailTemplates.name: otp-on-register
emailTemplates.subject: Verify Your Email for {{solidAppName}}
emailTemplates.description: This template is used to generate the account verification email sent to users to verify their email address when they register.

emailTemplates.name: otp-on-login
emailTemplates.subject: Your One-Time Password for {{solidAppName}}
emailTemplates.description: This template is used to send the email with the OTP when logging in.

emailTemplates.name: forgot-password
emailTemplates.subject: Reset Your Password for {{solidAppName}}
emailTemplates.description: This template is used to send the verification token required by users to reset their password.

emailTemplates.name: password-changed
emailTemplates.subject: Your {{solidAppName}} Password Has Been Updated
emailTemplates.description: This template notifies users that their account password was successfully changed.

smsTemplates.name: otp-on-register
smsTemplates.description: This template is used to generate the account verification sms sent to users to verify their mobile number when they register.

smsTemplates.name: otp-on-login
smsTemplates.description: This template is used to send the sms with the OTP when logging in.

smsTemplates.name: forgot-password
smsTemplates.description: This template is used to send the verification token required by users to reset their password.
